rationale: Acting on Review 1 adds the missing credits to Mathlib.RingTheory.HopfAlgebra.Basic (for the antipode_comp/left_inv_eq_right_inv technique and Sweedler lemmas visible in the diff) and Bialgebra.TensorProduct (for map/map_id/map_comp) into the module docstring, which directly improves attribution for this new file; Review 2's approve leaves the incomplete credit as-is and is therefore inferior.
